scripts.wp:plugin:activate: wp-env run cli wp plugin activate spintax
scripts.wp:plugin:deactivate: wp-env run cli wp plugin deactivate spintax
scripts.wp:db:reset: wp-env run cli wp db reset --yes
scripts.test:php:setup: wp-env run tests-cli -- bash -c "cd /tmp && composer require --dev yoast/phpunit-polyfills:^2.0 phpunit/phpunit:^9.6 2>&1"
